title: Cathepsin S regulates germinal center reactions and anti-tumor humoral responses.
snippet: B cells mature into antibody-secreting cells by antigen processing and presentation and undergo productive germinal center (GC) reactions in secondary lymphoid organs. In solid tumors, antigen presentation and local anti-tumor humoral immunity can arise through the formation of GC-like tertiary lymphoid structures (TLS). Here, we show that cathepsin S activ...

title: Aquaporin-1 sustains lymphangiogenic responses in hyperosmotic inflammatory microenvironments.
snippet: Intestinal lymphatic vessels are essential for dietary lipid absorption and immune cell trafficking. Villus lymphatic capillaries, lacteals, undergo continuous VEGF-C-dependent renewal to function in a hyperosmolar, inflammatory environment exposed to dietary and microbial by-products. To define mechanisms underlying this adaptation, we integrated new and p...
